name: Quick Brownies 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan with oleo.
3. In a bowl, combine the cocoa and flour; mix well.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition.
5. Stir in salt and vanilla until thoroughly combined.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely before removing from the pan.
